message:
fix: Add math.ldexp/frexp and test.support self-reference

- Add ldexp() and frexp() functions to math module for test_float
- Add self-reference `pub const support = @This()` to test/support.zig
  to support "from test.support import support" Python pattern
- Replace std.StringHashMap with hashmap_helper in multiple files
  (function_traits, generators, dev_commands, test_commands, incremental)

All 5 core tests now pass (100%):
- test_bool, test_float, test_int_literal, test_unary, test_binop
